q1_parity.question: Same 5 sections, same lede, same SEO after migration?
q1_parity.answer: Yes — 5 H2 sections preserved (the-research-knowledge-problem + how-adna-helps + typical-ontology-extensions + reading-path + reference); lede CID-matched (.lede[data-astro-cid-h6dpntfm]); jsonLD AND meta/og description identical and byte-for-byte vs pre-change (no override needed since they already matched).

q2_no_override.question: Is omitting the jsonLDDescription override safe here?
q2_no_override.answer: Yes — researchers' jsonLD description equals its layout description byte-for-byte, so PersonaPage's default (jsonLDDescription ?? description) reproduces it exactly. Adding an override would be redundant. Confirms the override is correctly conditional, not blanket.

q3_maintainability.question: Net lines removed; in-content cross-links intact?
q3_maintainability.answer: 89 -> 72 (-17); the 4 in-content links (triad, fair-metadata, convergence concepts + extend-the-ontology tutorial) are inside the default-slot body and untouched.

step_3_decide.change_selected: Migrate researchers onto <PersonaPage> with NO jsonLD override (descriptions already byte-identical); lede -> named slot; delete the .lede <style> block.
step_3_decide.ceiling_declared: structural DRY; -17 lines (no prose cut; page already lean post-D12)

step_4_implement.implementation_notes: Imports: DocumentationLayout + buildTechArticleJsonLD removed, PersonaPage added; CardGrid + researchers data kept. Local jsonLD const removed. <DocumentationLayout title/description jsonLD={jsonLD}> -> <PersonaPage title/description> (no override). Lede -> <Fragment slot='lede'>. <style> block (only .lede) removed.

post_change_inventory.meta_description_byte_for_byte: How research labs and science teams use aDNA to maintain knowledge provenance, reproducibility, and multi-agent context fidelity across long-running projects.
post_change_inventory.jsonld_description_byte_for_byte: How research labs and science teams use aDNA to maintain knowledge provenance, reproducibility, and multi-agent context fidelity across long-running projects. (equals meta; no override)

No jsonLD override needed (descriptions already byte-identical) — the contrast case that confirms the override is conditional. 5 H2 sections + 4 in-content concept/tutorial links intact.
